notes.apiKeyRotation: Repo now contains a different Firebase API key than the initial May 1 audit. Confirm the old key was revoked in GCP and only the new key remains active.
notes.apiKeyRestrictions: Confirm Android app restrictions plus only the required Firebase/Google APIs in GCP Credentials.
notes.billing: Confirm Blaze plan and budget alerts in Firebase/GCP before launch.
notes.appCheck: Confirm App Check is enabled for the Android app in Firebase Console.
notes.secrets: Set RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET, GOOGLE_PLAY_CLIENT_EMAIL, and GOOGLE_PLAY_PRIVATE_KEY in Firebase Secret Manager.
notes.googlePlay: Verify the Google Play service account has Android Publisher access.
notes.razorpay: Register the deployed razorpayWebhook URL in Razorpay Dashboard with payment.captured and subscription.activated.
notes.certificatePins: Certificate pin placeholders still exist in src/utils/certificatePinning.ts and fail-closed pinning is intentionally disabled until real SPKI pins are captured.
